requirement_topic.en: SONCAP Certificate / Customs Import (SON Conformity Assessment Programme)
requirement_topic.zh: SONCAP证书 / 海关进口（SON符合性评估计划）
requirement_topic.zht: SONCAP證書 / 海關進口（SON符合性評估計畫）

summary.en: The SON Conformity Assessment Programme (SONCAP) mandates that regulated imported goods, including electronics and wireless devices, must carry a valid SONCAP Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued by a SON-accredited conformity assessment body (CAB) before or at the point of customs entry into Nigeria. The SONCAP certificate is separate from NCC type approval and both are required. Import duty is applicable under the Nigeria Customs tariff schedule (ECOWAS Common External Tariff basis).
summary.zh: SON符合性评估计划（SONCAP）规定，受监管的进口商品（包括电子产品和无线设备）须在进入尼日利亚海关前或清关时，持有由SON认可的符合性评估机构（CAB）出具的有效SONCAP符合性证书（CoC）。SONCAP证书与NCC型式认可相互独立，两者均须取得。依据尼日利亚海关税则（基于ECOWAS共同对外关税），须缴纳进口关税。
summary.zht: SON符合性評估計畫（SONCAP）規定，受監管的進口商品（包括電子產品和無線設備）須在進入尼日利亞海關前或清關時，持有由SON認可的符合性評估機構（CAB）出具的有效SONCAP符合性證書（CoC）。SONCAP證書與NCC型式認可相互獨立，兩者均須取得。依據尼日利亞海關稅則（基於ECOWAS共同對外關稅），須繳納進口關稅。

standards_or_laws: SON SONCAP — SON Conformity Assessment Programme (mandatory for regulated imports)
Nigeria Customs Service tariff schedule (ECOWAS CET basis)
Finance Acts — applicable import duty and VAT on electronics

summary.en: China export documentation for electronics typically includes a China Inspection Certificate (CIQ), CCPIT Certificate of Origin, and commercial invoice/packing list. CCC, SRRC, and NAL certifications are domestic Chinese approvals only. There is no SONCAP equivalent in China; Chinese export procedures do not produce a SONCAP certificate.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品出口文件通常包括中国商检证书（CIQ）、中国国际贸易促进委员会原产地证（CCPIT）及商业发票/装箱单。CCC、SRRC和NAL认证均属中国境内批准。中国无SONCAP类似机制；中国出口程序不产生SONCAP证书。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品出口文件通常包括中國商檢證書（CIQ）、中國國際貿易促進委員會原產地證（CCPIT）及商業發票/裝箱單。CCC、SRRC和NAL認證均屬中國境內批准。中國無SONCAP類似機制；中國出口程序不產生SONCAP證書。

standards_or_laws: China Inspection and Quarantine (CIQ) export certificate
China customs export documentation — HS code, commercial invoice, packing list

gap.en: A SONCAP Certificate of Conformity must be obtained from a SON-accredited CAB before or at Nigerian customs entry — it is not produced by the Chinese export process. SONCAP is in addition to NCC type approval; both are required independently. Import duty under the ECOWAS Common External Tariff applies to electronics and must be factored into landed cost calculations.
gap.zh: 须在进入尼日利亚海关前或清关时，从SON认可的CAB取得SONCAP符合性证书——该证书不由中国出口流程产生。SONCAP与NCC型式认可相互独立，须分别取得。依据ECOWAS共同对外关税，电子产品须缴纳进口关税，应纳入到岸成本测算。
gap.zht: 須在進入尼日利亞海關前或清關時，從SON認可的CAB取得SONCAP符合性證書——該證書不由中國出口流程產生。SONCAP與NCC型式認可相互獨立，須分別取得。依據ECOWAS共同對外關稅，電子產品須繳納進口關稅，應納入到岸成本測算。

source.publisher: Standards Organisation of Nigeria (SON); Nigeria Customs Service

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A SONCAP Certificate of Conformity from a SON-accredited body is a customs-clearance prerequisite for wireless and electronic devices imported into Nigeria, separate from and in addition to NCC type approval. Chinese CCC, SRRC, and export certificates do not substitute for SONCAP. Import duty under the ECOWAS Common External Tariff applies.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 由SON认可机构出具的SONCAP符合性证书是无线及电子产品进口入尼日利亚的海关清关先决条件，与NCC型式认可相互独立，须分别取得。中国CCC、SRRC及出口证书均不能替代SONCAP。须依据ECOWAS共同对外关税缴纳进口关税。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 由SON認可機構出具的SONCAP符合性證書是無線及電子產品進口入尼日利亞的海關清關先決條件，與NCC型式認可相互獨立，須分別取得。中國CCC、SRRC及出口證書均不能替代SONCAP。須依據ECOWAS共同對外關稅繳納進口關稅。
